pkgmetadata.longdescription: aichat is an all-in-one LLM CLI written in Rust. It provides a Chat-REPL, shell assistant, RAG-over-files, and an agent/tools framework, talking to OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama, Groq, and many OpenAI-compatible local servers (llama.cpp, vllm, lemonade, llama-swap). Single static binary, dual-licensed Apache-2.0 / MIT.
